feature_stressed: grouped bars (multi-bar-per-x position) + asymmetric error caps. Directly mirrors the el-62 / el-80 verifier failures.
chart_title: Synthetic #3 — grouped bars, asymmetric error bars
bar_top_test: For each (bar_center_x, value) in GT, col = (bar_center_x − bx) / mx must land within ε of the topmost stroke row inside the bar's column span. If the extractor uses col = (group_index − bx) / mx instead, ALL three series collapse to the same column at each group's center, and the predicate will pick whichever bar happens to be at that column. This is the el-62/el-80 failure mode.
error_cap_test: Each upper cap should be at row = (value + yerr_upper − by) / my centered at the bar's column. Lower caps mirror at (value − yerr_lower − by) / my. Cap width ≈ 4 px (capsize=4).
